utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items required in the format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (specified), travel_dates (specified), transportation (has flights with total cost and some details; acceptable as flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel name with total cost and details; acceptable), activities (has total cost and a list of highlights; acceptable as selected activities with costs since total cost is given), additional_services (includes local transportation cost and travel insurance included with coverage but no explicit cost; however it states 'Included'—cost not specified numerically; still an extra service with implied cost of included—borderline but counts as provided with costs? The requirement is 'with costs'; 'Included' without amount likely fails), total_budget (given as a single figure but not a complete cost breakdown; breakdown of components mostly present but total doesn't add up clearly and lacks detailed breakdown presentation. Requirement is 'complete cost breakdown'—the package provides a total only, not a breakdown). Therefore: destination: covered (1), travel_dates: covered (2), transportation: covered (3), accommodation: covered (4), activities: covered (5), additional_services: not fully specified with costs because insurance cost not given (only 'Included'); local transportation has a cost but the item asks 'any extra services with costs'—at least one has cost, but the plural suggests covering all extras with costs; since one extra lacks cost, mark as not fully specified (still 5), total_budget: not a complete breakdown (only a total), so not covered. Total covered = 5 out of 7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Copenhagen, Denmark', transportation class 'economy class' on standard airlines (implied by 'Family package, economy class'), accommodation 'Family Haven Hotel', and activities that correspond to items in the ground-truth list: Zoo visit -> 'Zoo'; Science Museum -> 'Science Museum for kids'; Bicycle City Tour is not explicitly listed (closest is 'City Walking Tour' but not the same, so exclude); Viking Museum and Maritime Museum are not in the ground-truth list; Tivoli Gardens is not listed; 'Bicycle City Tour' not listed. Therefore, only map items that exactly match entries in the ratings. Additional services mention 'travel insurance' and 'local transportation' which are not in the ground-truth sections; no direct mapping. Thus, provide ratings for: Copenhagen, Denmark; Economy Class under standard airlines; Family Haven Hotel; Zoo; Science Museum for kids.
